title: Best way to cook frozen chicken nuggets - Canada.ca
content:
## Best way to cook frozen chicken nuggets
With described video
Current position: 00:00:00
Total time: --:--:--

## Transcript - Best way to cook frozen chicken nuggets
Image of refrigerator in kitchen.
TEXT ON-SCREEN: Frozen breaded chicken
Hand comes into frame and opens freezer drawer, removes a box of chicken nuggets.
TEXT ON-SCREEN: Take them out of the freezer
Image of countertop with green plate on it slides onto screen.
TEXT ON-SCREEN: and prepare to cook
Hand comes on screen with box of chicken nuggets and empties it out on the green plate.
Image of Microwave slides onto screen, hands open microwave door and put plate in.
TEXT ON-SCREEN: Wait!
Hand takes green plate out of microwave.
Hand closes microwave door.
TEXT ON-SCREEN: Do not use the microwave!
TEXT ON-SCREEN: Let's try this again!
Hands bring box of frozen, breaded chicken nuggets over countertop.
TEXT ON-SCREEN: Check those instructions: many frozen breaded chicken products are raw
Image of countertop with baking pan on it slides onto screen.
Hands empty box of chicken nuggets into it.
Image slides onto screen of hands washing up in the kitchen sink.
TEXT ON-SCREEN: Wash your hands after handling
Image of kitchen stove slides onto screen, hands place baking pan into oven.
TEXT ON-SCREEN: Place them in the oven so they cook properly!
Image of countertop slides onto screen.
TEXT ON-SCREEN: Serve them up!
Hands places plate of cooked chicken nuggets with sauces onto countertop.
Many different hands reach onto screen and take chicken nuggets one at a time.
TEXT ON-SCREEN: Remember, many frozen breaded chicken products are raw – always follow the cooking instructions
Hands continue to grab chicken nuggets until they're gone.
Hands wave over countertop.
TEXT ON-SCREEN: Food safety is in your hands!
URL ON-SCREEN: Canada.ca/FoodSafety
TEXT ON-SCREEN: Government of Canada logo
A message from the Government of Canada.
